description_long: This stereo sound system features a unique rounded triangular form factor with a smooth white top and a light gray fabric speaker grille wrapping around its sides. The top surface includes a large, centrally positioned black circular control, likely a multifunctional button or dial, and a smaller white button nearby. The speaker grille appears to be made of a fine mesh fabric, providing both acoustic transparency and a modern aesthetic. A black remote control with multiple buttons is included, suggesting wireless operation and additional functionality. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for placement in urban environments such as living rooms, offices, or public lounges. The object is compact and portable, with no visible display screen or external ports.
description: A sleek, triangular stereo sound system with a white top, gray mesh speaker grille, and a central black control button, accompanied by a black remote control.
description_view_0: The left side of the triangular stereo system is visible, showing the black remote control placed beside it and the prominent black control button on top.
description_view_1: The front face of the stereo system is shown, highlighting the continuous gray mesh grille and the white button on the top surface.
description_view_2: The right side of the stereo system is visible, with the remote control positioned on the opposite side and the black control button clearly seen.
description_view_3: A direct view of the front edge, with the remote control placed in front and the speaker grille wrapping around the curved front.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a fine, uniform mesh fabric pattern with no visible decorative elements or geometric shapes.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of a large, centrally located black circular button or dial and a smaller white button on the top surface, with no visible labels or additional controls.
